# CLAUDE.md — SkemaLS Website
### Generated by SkemaLS Website Builder | March 26, 2026

---

## WHAT THIS SITE IS

**Business:** SkemaLS (Skema Life System)
**Domain:** skemals.com
**Owner:** Camden Bennett — camden@pinedaleproperties.com

**Purpose:** SkemaLS builds custom AI-powered accountability systems for business owners who know what to do but can't stay consistent doing it.

**Primary action:** Complete qualifier form → book 15-minute discovery call.

**Audience:** Small business owners, 30–55, $100K–$2M revenue, services businesses.

---

## TECH STACK

- Next.js 14 App Router + TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS 3
- Vercel (auto-deploy on push to main)
- Fonts: Space Grotesk (headings) + Karla (body) via next/font/google
- Animation: GSAP + ScrollTrigger

**Rules:**
1. All copy lives in `content/siteContent.ts` — never edit text inside page/component files
2. Images in `/public/images/`
3. No new packages without asking
4. `npm run build` before any commit
5. Test at 375px before marking visual work done
6. 8px spacing grid — no arbitrary values
7. Complete files only — no stubs

---

## DESIGN SYSTEM

**Style:** Dark & Technical

**Colors:**
- Primary/CTA: `#DC2626`
- Secondary: `#2563EB`
- Accent: `#7C3AED`
- Background: `#0A0A12`
- Background alt: `#0E0E18`
- Card surface: `#111119`
- Text: `#F1F0EE`
- Text soft: `#C4C3BF`
- Muted: `#6B7280`
- Border: `rgba(255,255,255,0.06)`

**Fonts:** Space Grotesk 400/500/600/700, Karla 400/500/600

**Animation:** Scroll-triggered staggered reveals. CTA hover lift. Hero word entrance. Prefers-reduced-motion respected globally. Only animate transform + opacity. GSAP timing: 0.6–0.8s reveals, 0.1–0.15s stagger, power2.out easing.

**Feel:** Sophisticated AI tool meets human coaching. Confident, precise, technical. Not playful, not corporate.

**Grain texture:** Subtle SVG noise overlay on all sections at ~2.5% opacity.

---

## SITE STRUCTURE

```
/              Home (13-section long-scroll)
/about         Founder story + credibility
/services      PATH A / B / C full detail
/faq           Accordion objection kill
/contact       Qualifier form + booking + contact info
/resources     Blog placeholder (one post at launch)
```

## HOMEPAGE SECTIONS (in order)

1. **Hero** — bg image (`hero-abstract.png`), headline: "Your own AI accountability system. Built by a coach. Running every morning." Sub: "For business owners who know what to do but can't stay consistent. Custom-configured for your goals, your patterns, and the specific ways you get stuck — not a template, not an app, not someone else's system." CTAs: "Find Your Path" + "See How It Works." Feature strip: Pattern Recognition · Daily Accountability · Decision Support · Progress Tracking.
2. **Empathy** — "The Cure for Your Chaos." 2-3 paragraphs about end-of-day exhaustion and the app graveyard cycle. Transition: "This isn't a discipline problem. It's a systems problem."
3. **Proof Paragraph** — Blockquote, red left border. "The large majority of clients come in describing the wrong problem. Design tools, marketing help, dinner rush fixes — none of those are the actual issue. The intake process exists because people describe symptoms, not root causes."
4. **Schema Definition** — Dictionary-style. Georgia serif italic for "sche·ma" with pronunciation /ˈskiːmə/ and definition. Brand reveal: "SkemaLS — Skema Life System. Your goals. Your values. Your decision filters. Your patterns — built into an AI system you interact with every day."
5. **Path Selector** — "Is the problem you, your business, or both?" Three cards: PATH A "The Person" (red top border), PATH B "The Business" (blue), PATH C "Both" (purple). Each links to qualifier.
6. **How It Works** — Build → Deploy → Refine. Three columns with large ghost numbers.
7. **Features** — 6 cards in 2-col grid: Morning Log, Pattern Recognition, Accountability That Doesn't Flinch, Capture Everything Do What Matters, Decide Faster Decide Better, Proof You're Moving. Purple-accented progressive deployment callout below.
8. **What It's Not** — 5-row grid: Not a course / Not a chatbot / Not a template / Not just software / Not theoretical.
9. **Social Proof** — Three metric cards (~$9K sponsor commitments, 7/7 journal days, Week 1 self-diagnosis). Angela Douglas quote (mark as pending permission in HTML comment).
10. **Founder** — 200px headshot (`camden-headshot.jpg`). Condensed bio. Philosophy: "The solution is usually not far away."
11. **Qualifier Form** — Interactive 5-question step-through with progress bar. Q1: personal/business/both (routes PATH A/B/C). Q2: frustrating day (textarea). Q3: what tried (multi-select). Q4: 90-day outcome (textarea). Q5: name + email. Result shows PATH designation + "Book Your Free Call" CTA.
12. **CTA** — "Ready to stop carrying everything in your head?" Trust: "You own your account. You own your data. No lock-in. No black box." Contact: camden@pinedaleproperties.com · 307-367-6683
13. **Footer** — SkemaLS · About · Services · FAQ · Contact · Pinedale, Wyoming

## SEO

JSON-LD @graph model in `lib/schema.ts`:
- Organization: SkemaLS, skemals.com, @id: https://skemals.com/#organization
- WebSite: @id: https://skemals.com/#website, publisher refs Organization
- Person: Camden Bennett, Founder, @id: https://skemals.com/#founder
- Service: AI Accountability Coaching, linked to Organization
- FAQPage: on /faq page

Per-page schema in each page.tsx. Sitemap auto-generated. Canonical URLs. OG images 1200×630 per page.

Title format: `[Page Topic] — SkemaLS`

---

## SECURITY

Headers in `next.config.ts`:
- X-Frame-Options: DENY
- X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff
- Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin
- Permissions-Policy: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=(), payment=()
- Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=63072000; includeSubDomains; preload
- Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; appropriate directives per integration

Qualifier form: honeypot field + server-side validation in API route + rate limiting. Secrets in Vercel env vars only (ACTIVECAMPAIGN_API_KEY — never NEXT_PUBLIC_).

---

## PERFORMANCE TARGETS

Lighthouse 95+. LCP < 2.5s. CLS < 0.1. Max 2 font families, 4 weights total. securityheaders.com Grade A.

---
